rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HIMATLAL R. MEHTA AND JYOTSNA H. MEHTA REVOCABLE T TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 13, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200 Et Seq.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/22/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) The petitioning or moving party must include with their notice of hearing or notice of motion the procedures for making a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6) No proposed order has been recevied or lodged with the court. Any party lodging a proposed order in a contested matter must file proof of service of the proposed order on all parties entitled to notice of the petition (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A.4). Please deliever courtesy of copies of all further filings and a proposed order no later than 10/08/2025 to avoid additional continuance.
